feature: Fix test recording/run screenshots to be saved per repository
workflow_rationale: Single-service bug fix with clear root cause. Affects 4 files in one service. No complex dependencies or phases needed.

phases.name: Fix Screenshot Path Resolution
phases.description: Update recorder and runner to use repository-specific screenshot directories

subtasks.description: Update PlaywrightRecorder to accept and use repositoryId for screenshot path
subtasks.notes: Updated PlaywrightRecorder to accept repositoryId parameter. Constructor now builds screenshot directory path with repositoryId when provided. Updated takeScreenshot() to return correct public path. Modified getRecorder() singleton to accept optional repositoryId and create new instances when repository changes. Build verification skipped due to restricted commands but code is syntactically correct.

subtasks.description: Update PlaywrightRunner to accept and use repositoryId for screenshot path
subtasks.notes: Updated PlaywrightRunner to accept repositoryId parameter. Constructor now builds screenshot directory path with repositoryId when provided. Updated screenshot public paths for both success and failure cases to include repositoryId. Modified getRunner() singleton to accept optional repositoryId and create new instances when repository changes. Build verification skipped due to restricted commands but code follows exact same pattern as completed subtask-1-1 (PlaywrightRecorder).

subtasks.description: Update recording server actions to pass repositoryId to recorder
subtasks.notes: Updated all recording server actions to accept optional repositoryId parameter and pass it to getRecorder(). Functions updated: startRecording, stopRecording, captureScreenshot, getRecordingStatus, clearLastCompletedSession. Build verification skipped due to restricted commands but code follows TypeScript patterns correctly.

subtasks.description: Update test run server actions to pass repositoryId to runner
Manual verification: Test recording creates repo-specific directory

verification.instructions: 1. Start app (pnpm dev), 2. Create test recording, 3. Verify screenshots saved to ./public/screenshots/{repositoryId}/

subtasks.description: Manual verification: Test run creates repo-specific directory

verification.instructions: 1. Run existing tests, 2. Verify screenshots saved to ./public/screenshots/{repositoryId}/

acceptance_criteria: No errors when repositoryId is null (graceful fallback)

verification_steps.name: TypeScript Build
verification_steps.expected_outcome: Build succeeds with no type errors

verification_strategy.reasoning: Medium risk bug fix affecting test data persistence. Requires TypeScript compilation check and manual verification of screenshot paths.
